app.name: DOCX JS Editor
app.one_liner: Open-source WYSIWYG DOCX editor for the browser with no server required.

screens.name: Editor View
screens.purpose: Primary interface for editing DOCX documents with WYSIWYG controls, track changes, and comment management.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Save the edited DOCX document by patching only changed paragraphs in document.xml using selective XML saving.

mvp_plan: week 1: Enable client-side document loading and saving
week 1: Implement basic WYSIWYG toolbar with formatting controls
week 1: Integrate core DOCX parsing and rendering engine
acceptance_tests: Edits made in the editor are saved correctly using selective XML patching without corrupting the document.
User can load a DOCX file and see accurate rendering of text, tables, and images.
